verdict_reason: Cross-tag coherence: 2.45's tags (sattva-clarity, rajas-restlessness, tamas-inertia, team-state) are coherent with 2.48's (operator-system-coupling, incident-response, team-state) — both verses anchor in the operator's stable state across surrounding fluctuation. 2.45 names the stability across the three-guṇa team-state oscillations; 2.48 names the stability across success-fail dashboard movements (samatvam). The two verses describe complementary aspects of the same sthita-prajña / settled-operator portrait that 2.54 onwards elaborates. Cross-references in source pack (to 2.41 frame-completion, to 2.42 scoping-corrective, to 2.46 thematic-closure, to 14.5 doctrinal-continuation) all resolve to existing verses. The 14.5 reference correctly notes that the metaphysical apparatus of the three guṇas is elaborated in chapter 14, not here. PASS for both 6.1 and 6.5.
